- accommodation: 'Eco Lodge, €225 total (5 nights at €90/night with 50%... )' (name and costs given; note math inconsistency and nights mismatch, but details present; counts as specified).
- activities: Listed with individual costs and total (€105) (specified).
- additional_services: 'VeganYou partner restaurant meals €100 (€20/day for 5 days...)' (specified with costs).
- total_budget: '€505 total (€395 under the €900 budget limit)' (complete cost given; though internal cost math inconsistencies exist, but an overall total is provided).
All 7 items are present with details and costs where required.
